seo_title.zh: 户外能源标识解决方案 | ETIA

seo_desc.en: Weatherable, flame-retardant and permanent labels for solar, wind, energy storage and power transmission — durable through UV, salt spray and thermal cycling.
seo_desc.zh: 面向光伏、风电、储能与电力输配的耐候、阻燃与永久标识，耐 UV、盐雾与高低温循环。

title.zh: 户外能源标识解决方案

slogan.en: No failure in extreme environments — lifelong traceability for every asset
slogan.zh: 极端环境不失效，设备终身可溯源

zh: 随着光伏、风电、储能、电力输配等新能源产业高速发展，设备长期暴露于紫外老化、盐雾腐蚀、高低温循环等极端户外环境中，标识的耐久性直接决定资产的可追溯性与安全合规性。
ETIA 户外能源标识体系，专为能源行业严酷工况量身打造，覆盖光伏新能源、风电、储能系统、电力输配四大核心领域。从 10 年以上耐候级氟素标签，到 UL94 V-0 阻燃绝缘标识，从 316 不锈钢海上风电永久铭牌，到柔性乙烯基电缆标识，形成完整的全场景产品矩阵。
全系配备三级覆膜防护体系（PET/Vinyl/PVF），适配背板、镀锌钢、塑料壳体、电缆曲面等多种基材，确保标识在设备全生命周期内清晰可读、粘贴牢固，守护能源资产从投产到退役的全程追溯与安全合规。
en: As solar, wind, energy-storage and power-transmission industries grow, equipment sits for years in extreme outdoor conditions — UV aging, salt-spray corrosion and thermal cycling — and label durability directly determines asset traceability and safety compliance.

ETIA's outdoor-energy identification system is built for the harsh duty of the energy sector, covering four core domains: solar, wind, energy storage and power transmission. From 10-year-plus weatherable fluoropolymer labels to UL94 V-0 flame-retardant insulation labels, and from 316-stainless offshore-wind nameplates to flexible vinyl cable labels — a complete, full-scenario product matrix.

The range carries a three-tier overlaminate system (PET/Vinyl/PVF) for backsheets, galvanized steel, plastic housings and curved cable surfaces, keeping identification legible and firmly bonded across the equipment's full life — guarding traceability and compliance from commissioning to retirement.

intro.en: Full-scenario labels for module backsheets, combiner boxes, mounting and junction boxes, and EVA/POE film processes.
intro.zh: 组件背板、汇流箱、支架接线盒与 EVA/POE 胶膜制程的全场景标识。

line.en: Fluoropolymer face · 10+ yr outdoor · anti-UV · backsheet high-tack
line.zh: 氟素面层 · 10+ 年户外耐候 · 抗 UV · 背板专用高粘胶
标准耐候 PET · 5-8 年 · 镀锌专用胶 · 120℃

line.en: UL94 V-0 · dielectric · in-box high-temp stable
line.zh: UL94 V-0 阻燃 · 绝缘耐压 · 箱内高温稳定
低粘可移除 · 零残胶 · 洁净室

intro.en: Long-life labels for onshore wind blades and components in abrasive, UV-heavy environments.
intro.zh: 陆上风电叶片及零部件在风沙、UV 环境下的长期标识。

line.en: Weatherable PET · abrasion · UV-stable · large-curve high-tack
line.zh: 耐候 PET · 耐风沙磨损 · UV 稳定 · 大曲面强粘

intro.en: Transformer nameplates, switchgear parameters, and pole / cable-routing labels.
intro.zh: 变压器铭牌、高压开关柜参数与杆塔/电缆走向标识。

line.en: Aluminum / stainless · laser / etch permanent · IP65
line.zh: 铝 / 不锈钢 · 激光 / 蚀刻永久 · IP65

line.en: UL94 V-0 · crisp print · cabinet temp-stable
line.zh: UL94 V-0 · 参数级清晰 · 柜内温变稳定

line.en: Colored vinyl · curved surfaces · anti-UV abrasion · color-coding
line.zh: 彩色乙烯基 · 曲面适配 · 抗 UV 耐磨 · 颜色编码

intro.en: Battery-cluster, PCS nameplate and high-voltage safety / fire-warning labels.
intro.zh: 电池簇、PCS 变流器铭牌与高压安全/消防警示标识。

line.en: UL94 V-0 · dielectric · 10-yr weatherable · high-contrast print
line.zh: UL94 V-0 · 绝缘耐压 · 10 年耐候 · 高对比印刷
2.0mil 抗 UV · 永久压敏胶 · 7 年抗 UV
